title: Service Blueprinting Input
description: Required and optional inputs for executing the Service Blueprinting skill.

problem_statement.description: The business problem or diagnostic question to be analyzed.

company_context.description: Company background, industry, size, and relevant business context.

service_scope_definition.description: Service scope definition: the specific service, the target customer segment and the start and end points of the service being mapped

existing_customer_journey.description: Existing customer journey map or a documented inventory of customer touchpoints and stages across the service

list_internal_roles.description: List of internal roles involved in service delivery at frontstage and backstage levels

inventory_supporting_systems.description: Inventory of supporting systems and technology platforms used at each stage of the service

service_level_agreement.description: Service level agreement requirements specifying the quality and turnaround standards the service is expected to meet

failure_frequency_data.description: Failure frequency data by touchpoint or stage, including customer complaint data and failure mode logs

cost.description: Cost-per-interaction data to enable prioritization of improvement opportunities by financial impact
